name: SnapRender
description: Website screenshot API tailored for AI agents (Claude, ChatGPT, LangChain). POST a URL and receive the rendered image binary, or JSON with base64 + metadata. Cached responses don't count against quota. Supports PNG/JPEG/WebP/PDF, device emulation, dark mode, ad blocking. $29/mo for 10K screenshots.

tools.name: screenshot
tools.description: Capture a screenshot of a URL. Returns the image binary directly, or JSON metadata + base64 when `response_type=json`. Cached renders do not consume quota.

response_type.description: `json` returns metadata + base64 image instead of raw binary

device.description: Device preset to emulate (e.g. iphone_14, pixel_7)

wait_for_selector.description: CSS selector to wait for before capturing

delay_ms.description: Extra delay in milliseconds before capturing

selector.description: Capture only the element matching this CSS selector

cache.description: Use cached render if available (doesn't consume quota)

tools.name: screenshot_info
tools.description: Check whether a screenshot for the given URL + params is already cached, without triggering a new render. Useful for cost estimation.
